item.title: (1966) Revolver
item.description: Artist: The Beatles Released: August 5, 1966 Label: Parlophone Producer: George Martin Studio: Abbey Road Studios Genre: Primary: Pop rock, psychedelic pop Secondary: Psychedelic rock, baroque pop RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Revolver is the last Beatles album the band could have performed live, and...

item.title: (1967) Reach Out
item.description: Artist: The Four Tops Released: July 1967 Label: Motown Records Producer: Holland-Dozier-Holland Genre: Primary: Motown sound Secondary: Baroque pop, rhythm & blues, Brill Building RYM · Apple Music · Spotify “Reach Out, I’ll Be There” builds like an emergency.

item.description: Artist: The Beatles Released: May 26, 1967 Label: Parlophone Producer: George Martin Studio: Abbey Road Studios Genre: Primary: Psychedelic pop, pop rock Secondary: Psychedelic rock, art rock, baroque pop, sunshine pop, music hall, toytown pop RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Seven hundred hours of stud...

item.title: (1969) Dusty in Memphis
item.description: Artist: Dusty Springfield Released: March 31, 1969 Label: Atlantic Records Producer: Jerry Wexler, Tom Dowd, Arif Mardin Genre: Primary: Pop soul, blue-eyed soul Secondary: Southern soul, smooth soul RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Jerry Wexler brought Dusty Springfield to American Sound Studio in Memp...

item.title: (2011) The Smile Sessions
item.description: Artist: The Beach Boys Released: November 1, 2011 (recorded 1966–1967) Label: Capitol Records Producer: Brian Wilson Genre: Primary: Baroque pop, psychedelic pop, progressive pop, art pop Secondary: Sunshine pop, sound collage RYM · Apple Music · Spotify “Good Vibrations” changes key, tempo, mood, ...

item.description: Artist: The Beatles Released: July 10, 1964 Label: Parlophone Producer: George Martin Studio: Abbey Road Studios Genre: Primary: Pop rock Secondary: Rock & roll, folk pop, film soundtrack, British rhythm & blues Scene: Merseybeat Movement: British beat boom RYM · Apple Music · Spotify That ...

item.title: (1964) Where Did Our Love Go
item.description: Artist: The Supremes Released: August 31, 1964 Label: Motown Records Producer: Holland-Dozier-Holland Genre: Primary: Girl group, Motown sound RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The title track opens with foot stomps, handclaps, and a baritone saxophone riff so simple it barely qualifies as a melody, and ...

item.title: (1965) The Beach Boys Today!
item.description: Artist: The Beach Boys Released: March 8, 1965 Label: Capitol Records Producer: Brian Wilson Studio: Western Recorders, Gold Star Studios Genre: Primary: Pop rock, baroque pop Secondary: Sunshine pop, vocal surf, vocal group RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Side B of this record is where Brian Wilson st...
